title: alisma plantago-aquatica var. canaliculatum
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica var. canaliculatum, also known as the narrow-leaved water plantain or Chinese water chestnut, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Alismataceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues, fever, and inflammation due to its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica var. canaliculatum include reducing fluid retention, relieving symptoms of menopause, and supporting kidney function, among others. Alisma plantago-aquatica var. canaliculatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
